name: report_param
full_help:
report_param

Description: 
Get information about all parameters

Syntax: 
report_param  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-non_default] [-return_string] [-quiet]
              [-verbose] [<pattern>]

Returns: 
param report

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-file]           Filename to output results to. (send output to console if
                    -file is not used)
  [-append]         Append the results to file, don't overwrite the results 
                    file
  [-non_default]    Report only params that are set to a non default value
  [-return_string]  Return report as string
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<pattern>]       Display params matching pattern
                    Default: *

Categories: 
PropertyAndParameter, Report
